name: excited1_pose
frames: Pose: crouching down low with knees deeply bent, body compressed, fists clenched in front of her chest, huge excited grin, sparkling wide eyes, gathering energy to jump.
Pose: leaping in mid-air, both arms thrown straight up in celebration, legs tucked slightly, mouth wide open in a joyful cheer, eyes shining with excitement, hair and lab coat flying upward.
